calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-22-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FERREIRO's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment" is granted.

Order signed. Consent Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgement
Off Calendar Jun-22-2022 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-25-2022 Continued To Aug-09-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-28-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Thomas L. Van Wynqarden, Esq., PILLSBURY WINTHROP SHAW PITTMAN LLP, (213) 488-7100 for Defendant Walmart Inc.,
No other apperances.

Plaintiff contested the court's teantive ruling untimely. (contest eamil received at 7:45 a.m. April 28, 2022) No appearance is made by Plaintiff.

The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows:(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FERREIRO Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is taken off calender. Plaintiff may renotice this matter as a reqularly set motion.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
